messages.content: VocГӘ Г© um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migraГ§ГЈo multicloud e modernizaГ§ГЈo on-premises. Seja tГ©cnico, objetivo e nГЈo invente serviГ§os inexistentes.
Qual a diferenГ§a entre Security Lists e Network Security Groups (NSG) no OCI?

## Security Lists vs NSG em OCI

### ComparaГ§ГЈo

| Aspecto | Security List | Network Security Group |
|---------|---------------|------------------------|
| Escopo | VCN inteira | Recursos especГӯficos |
| aplicГЎvel a | Subnets | VNICs de recursos |
| Stateful | Sim | Sim |
| Stateful return | AutomГЎtico | AutomГЎtico |
| MГЎximo regras | 50 ingress + 50 egress | 20 ingress + 20 egress |
| Priority | Baseada em ordem | Sem ordem (todas avaliam) |

### Quando Usar Security Lists

```bash
# Ideal para regras de rede base aplicadas a toda subnet
# Exemplo: firewall tradicional

# Criar Security List para Web Tier
oci network security-list create \
  --vcn-id $VCN_ID \
  --display-name "web-s" \
  --ingress-security-rules '[{"protocol":"6","source":"0.0.0.0/0","tcp-options":{"destination-port-range":{"min":80,"max":80}}},{"protocol":"6","source":"0.0.0.0/0","tcp-options":{"destination-port-range":{"min":443,"max":443}}}]' \
  --egress-security-rules '[{"protocol":"6","destination":"10.0.2.0/24"}]'
```

### Quando Usar NSG

```bash
# Ideal para microsegmentaГ§ГЈo e controle granular
# Exemplo: apenas algumas instГўncias especГӯficas

# Criar NSG
oci network nsg create \
  --compartment-id $COMPARTMENT_ID \
  --vcn-id $VCN_ID \
  --display-name "app-nsg"

# Adicionar regras NSG
oci network nsg-rules create \
  --nsg-id $NSG_ID \
  --direction "INGRESS" \
  --protocol "6" \
  --sourcecidr "10.0.1.0/24" \
  --destination-port-range "{"min":8080,"max":8080}"

oci network nsg-rules create \
  --nsg-id $NSG_ID \
  --direction "EGRESS" \
  --protocol "all" \
  --destinationcidr "0.0.0.0/0"
```

### Aplicando NSG a Recursos

```bash
# Ao criar instГўncia, especificar NSG
oci compute instance create \
  --compartment-id $COMPARTMENT_ID \
  --shape "VM.Standard2.1" \
  --subnet-id $SUBNET_ID \
  --nsg-ids "[$NSG_ID]" \
  --display-name "app-instance"

# Adicionar NSG a VNIC existente
oci compute vnic attach \
  --instance-id $INSTANCE_ID \
  --nsg-ids "[$NSG_ID]"
```

### Melhores PrГЎticas

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Security List          в”Ӯ  Network Security Group     в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  Regras de subnet       в”Ӯ  Regras de aplicaГ§ГЈo        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Default deny ingress   в”Ӯ  Allow especГӯfico           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Allow all egress       в”Ӯ  MicrosegmentaГ§ГЈo          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Modelo tradicional     в”Ӯ  Modelo moderno            в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Riscos e ConsideraГ§Гөes

| Risco | MitigaГ§ГЈo |
|-------|-----------|
| Regras duplicadas | Use SL ou NSG, nГЈo ambos para mesmo trГЎfico |
| Complexidade | SL para regras bГЎsicas, NSG para granularidade |
| Limite de regras | Planeje bem para nГЈo exceder 50 por SL |

### CombinaГ§ГЈo Recomendada

```
1. Security List: Regras de rede base (subnet-level)
2. NSG: Regras especГӯficas de aplicaГ§ГЈo (resource-level)
3. Ambos: Para mГЎxima seguranГ§a em produГ§ГЈo
```
